svg.title: Multi-Agent AI Travel Finder Architecture
svg.desc: Flowchart showing user input flowing to a main orchestrator that routes to 5 specialized agents: Flight, Weather, Hotel, Attractions, and Summary. Each agent queries external APIs and returns data that converges into a final travel itinerary.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about how user input is processed')
sendPrompt('How does the orchestrator route to agents?')
g.text: Routes requests to 5 agents in parallel

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What APIs does the flight agent use?')
sendPrompt('What weather data does this agent fetch?')
sendPrompt('How does the hotel agent find accommodations?')
sendPrompt('Where does attractions data come from?')
sendPrompt('What information does the summary agent aggregate?')
sendPrompt('Show me the flight agent implementation')
sendPrompt('Show me the weather agent implementation')
sendPrompt('Show me the hotel agent implementation')
sendPrompt('Show me the attractions agent implementation')
sendPrompt('Show me the summary agent implementation')
sendPrompt('How is data from all agents combined?')
sendPrompt('What format is the final output?')
sendPrompt('Show me an example of the final output')
g.text: 💰 Total Budget | 📋 Daily Breakdown | ⚠️ Travel Alerts

svg.text: Click any box for more details • All agents work in parallel • Real-time API calls • LangGraph state management
